meals.name: Chicken Pineapple Fried Rice
meals.label: Meal A
ings: 3 cups cooked jasmine rice, cold — cook and refrigerate Monday or day before
½ lb boneless skinless chicken thighs, sliced thin
1 cup frozen mixed vegetables (peas, carrots, corn, green beans)
¼ tsp salt, ¼ tsp black pepper
Marinade: 2 tsp soy sauce + 2 tsp sesame oil + 1 tsp cornstarch + ¼ tsp baking soda
steps: Cook rice ahead of time (Monday): Cook 1½ cups jasmine rice. Let cool completely, then refrigerate overnight.
Slice chicken thighs thin and toss with marinade. Let sit 10–15 minutes.
Break up the cold rice with clean hands or a rice paddle into individual grains.
Heat 1 tbsp oil in wok over medium-high. Fry chicken until cooked through, 4–5 min. Remove.
Sauté garlic and onion. Add vegetables and pineapple. Cook 3–4 min.
Push to side. Add remaining oil. Add rice, soy sauce, fish sauce. Stir-fry 2–3 min.
Add chicken back. Toss and serve with green onions and sesame seeds.
meals.note: 💡 Pre-cook the rice Monday — non-negotiable for good fried rice.

meals.name: Greek Chicken Bowls with Tzatziki
meals.label: Meal B
meals.meta: ~35 min · Bowls · Marinate Tuesday night · Serves 4
ings: Olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano for marinade
steps: Make tzatziki: grate cucumber, squeeze dry, mix with yogurt, garlic, dill.
Grill or pan-sear chicken 5–7 min per side. Rest and slice.
Build bowls: rice, chicken, hummus, cucumber salad, tzatziki, feta.
meals.note: 💡 Tzatziki improves overnight — make it ahead.

meals.name: Asian Turkey Lettuce Wraps
meals.label: Meal C
ings: Hoisin, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil
Butter lettuce, green onions, sesame seeds
steps: Whisk sauce ingredients. Sauté garlic and ginger 30 sec.
Add water chestnuts and sauce. Cook 2 min.
Serve in lettuce cups with toppings.
meals.note: 💡 Let kids build their own lettuce tacos.
